use_cases: Displaying nested folder and file structures in project explorers or file managers
Navigating hierarchical category or organizational structures in web applications
Browsing nested configuration or settings panels with collapsible sections
Representing decision trees or dependency graphs in developer tools
ai_summary: A Chakra UI-based tree view component that renders hierarchical folder and file structures with expandable/collapsible nodes. Uses react-icons (LuFolder, LuFile) for visual distinction between directories and files. Supports keyboard navigation and standard tree interactions. Built with createTreeCollection for managing nested node data.
